Class# ARQuickLookPreviewItem

iOS 13.0+iPadOS 13.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+visionOS 1.0+

```
class ARQuickLookPreviewItem
```

## [Topics](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem#topics)

### [Initializers](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem#Initializers)

[`init(fileAt: URL)`](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem/init(fileat:))Creates an object representing the 3D content that will be previewed in AR Quick Look.### [Instance Properties](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem#Instance-Properties)

[`var allowsContentScaling: Bool`](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem/allowscontentscaling)Whether or not AR Quick Look allows content scaling in AR mode. Defaults to `YES` which allows scaling content in AR mode.[`var canonicalWebPageURL: URL?`](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem/canonicalwebpageurl)An optional canonical web page URL for the 3D content that will be shared.## [Relationships](/documentation/quicklook/arquicklookpreviewitem#relationships)
